emails.subject: Why your weight won't budge even when you do everything right
emails.preview: Your doctor may be missing this
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

If you're dealing with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] and your doctor keeps saying your labs look fine — you deserve a second opinion that actually goes deeper.

At Proactive Wellness Centers in Vienna, VA, Dr. Lynese Lawson, MD takes a fundamentally different approach. Instead of treating symptoms with prescriptions, she investigates why your body is out of balance in the first place.

That means testing what most doctors don't order:

- MTHFR gene mutation — affects how your body processes nutrients, hormones, and toxins
- Full cardiometabolic panel — insulin, inflammatory markers, advanced lipid fractions
- Comprehensive hormone profile — testosterone, thyroid, cortisol, estrogen
- Gut microbiome and digestive function markers

This is why patients who have tried everything finally get answers here. When [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT] is identified and addressed at the source, [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] becomes achievable — not through willpower, but through biology.

We have new patient appointments available.

Book your consultation: [BOOKING_LINK]

To your proactive health,
Dr. Lynese Lawson, MD & The PWC Team
Proactive Wellness Centers — Vienna, VA

emails.subject: The gene mutation that could be sabotaging your health
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Here's something most doctors never test for — but that affects an estimated 40% of the population:

The MTHFR gene mutation.

When this gene doesn't function properly, your body struggles to convert folate into its active form. The downstream effects are surprisingly wide-reaching: elevated homocysteine (a heart attack risk factor), poor detoxification, mood imbalances, difficulty losing weight, fatigue, and heightened inflammation.

Standard bloodwork won't catch it. Most annual physicals don't include it. But it may be the hidden driver behind [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] that nobody has connected for you yet.

At Proactive Wellness Centers, Dr. Lawson routinely tests for MTHFR and interprets results in the context of your full clinical picture — hormones, cardiovascular risk, metabolic function, and gut health all together.

When you know what you're actually dealing with, [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] becomes a precise, targeted plan — not a guessing game.

Ready to find out what's really going on?

Book your root cause evaluation: [BOOKING_LINK]

Dr. Lynese Lawson, MD
Proactive Wellness Centers — Vienna, VA

*This is educational content, not medical advice. Individual results vary.

emails.subject: He was 52, on 3 medications, and told it was 'just aging'
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

When Marcus came to Proactive Wellness Centers, he was 52 years old, carrying 40 extra pounds, exhausted by 2pm every day, and on three medications his cardiologist said he would be on 'for life.'

His previous doctors had run standard panels. Everything was 'within normal range.' He was told it was just aging.

Dr. Lawson ran a different set of tests: MTHFR genotyping, advanced lipid fractionation, full hormone panel including free testosterone and DHEA, insulin resistance markers, and inflammatory cytokines. What came back painted a clear picture — MTHFR compound heterozygous, low-normal testosterone, insulin resistance at a subclinical level, and elevated Lp(a) that standard cholesterol panels miss.

Six months into a personalized protocol addressing all of these simultaneously: 31 pounds released, energy sustained through the evening, and off two of the three medications with his cardiologist's agreement.

Marcus's story isn't unusual here. It's what happens when [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] gets a real investigation instead of a Band-Aid.

If you're ready for that kind of care, we have openings.

Book your appointment: [BOOKING_LINK]

The Proactive Wellness Centers Team
Vienna, VA

*Individual results vary. Patient details changed for privacy. Nothing here constitutes medical advice or guarantees specific outcomes.

🔑 THE CORE FINDING: RANKED IN 1,823 KEYWORDS BUT MISSING AI SEARCH ENTIRELY
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1,823 keywords ranked — a solid footprint for an independent practice. Position breakdown:
- Positions 1–3: 4 keywords
- Positions 4–10: 20 keywords
- Positions 11–20: 26 keywords
- Positions 21+: 1,773 keywords

The top-line number looks strong, but 97% of ranked keywords sit below page one. The practice captures ~1,088 visits per month — but its estimated traffic value of $1,282/mo is well below what the keyword volume should produce, meaning high-intent terms are slipping through.

🤖 AI SEARCH GAP
──────────────────
19 keywords trigger an AI Overview in Google search results. Proactive Wellness Centers is cited in 0 of those AI Overview responses. That is a complete gap: every time Google's AI answers questions like 'obesity doctor near me' or 'MTHFR therapy,' this practice is invisible — despite ranking organically for those same queries. As AI Overviews displace traditional results, this gap will compound.

🎯 BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY: WEIGHT LOSS & METABOLIC MEDICINE CLUSTER
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
The highest-volume non-branded cluster is concentrated around weight and metabolic care:

- [pos 8] obesity doctor near me — 880/mo, KD 4

🎯 3-PRIORITY ATTACK PLAN
──────────────────────────
1. **Push 'obesity doctor near me' from pos 8 to top 5** — At KD 4 and 880 searches/month, this is the highest-ROI single move in this dataset. Optimize the weight management service page with Vienna, VA location signals. Target: top-5 within 60 days.
